zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich I von Salm於大約1115年出生在盧森堡盧布格時，他的父親Hermann II von Salm41歲，母親Agnès de Mousson25歲。他於1169年之前與Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾薩爾姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1166年在法國洛萊沃斯格斯瑟農斯享年52歲，埋葬在法國德 艾斯特莫瑟勒梅斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich I von Salm于大约1115年出生在卢森堡盧布格时，他的父亲Hermann II von Salm41岁，母亲Agnès de Mousson25岁。他于1169年之前与Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾薩爾姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1166年在法国洛萊沃斯格斯瑟農斯享年52岁，埋葬在法国德 艾斯特莫瑟勒梅斯。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Salm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erna, Ernst, Erwin, Gunther, Heinz, Johann, Otto, Rainer.

German and Dutch: from Middle High German salm, Dutch zalm ‘salmon’, probably in most cases a topographic or habitational name referring to a house identified by the sign of a salmon, but in some cases an occupational name for a salmon fisher.
German and French (Alsace and Lorraine): habitational name from Salm on the Mosel, or from Salm in Alsace.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich I von Salm was born about 1115, in Luxembourg, Luxembourg, his father, Hermann II von Salm, was 41 and his mother, Agnès de Mousson, was 25. He married Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg before 1169, in Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1166, in Senones, Vosges, Lorraine, France, at the age of 52, and was buried in Metz, Moselle, Grand Est, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich I von Salm est né environ 1115, à Luxembourg, Luxembourg, son père, Hermann II von Salm, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Mousson, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg avant 1169, à Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1166, à Senones, Vosges, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Metz, Moselle, Grand Est, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich I von Salm um 1115 in Luxembourg, Luxemburg geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hermann II von Salm 41 und seine Mutter Agnès de Mousson 25. Er hat vor 1169 in Salm, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1166 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Senones, Vosges, Lothringen, Frankreich und wurde in Metz, Moselle, Großer Osten, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich I von Salm è nato il circa 1115 nel Luxembourg, Lussemburgo, il suo padre, Hermann II von Salm, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Agnès de Mousson, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg prima del 1169, nel Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1166, nel Senones, Vosges, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Metz, Moselle, Grand Est, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich I von Salmが約1115年にルクセンブルクルクセンボウルグで生まれた時，父Hermann II von Salmは41歳，母Agnès de Moussonは25歳であった。1169年以前にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンサルムでClementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1166年にフランスロレィヌボスジェズセノンスで52歳で死去し，フランスグランド エストモセルメッツにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich I von Salm(이)가 대략 1115년 룩셈부르크 루세보우르그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hermann II von Salm(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de Mousson(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1169년 이전 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 살름에서 Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1166년 프랑스 로레이인 보스그스 센네스에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 모셀 멧즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich I von Salm nasceu aproximadamente 1115, em Luxembourg, Luxemburgo, seu pai, Hermann II von Salm, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Mousson, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg antes 1169, em Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1166, em Senones, Vosges, Lorraine, França, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Metz, Moselle, Grand Est, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich I von Salm родился около 1115 г. в местности луксембург, Люксембург, его отцу по имени Hermann II von Salm было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Mousson, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg перед 1169 г. в местности салм, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1166 г. в местности сеноунесь, фосгесь, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности мец, моселл, гранд эст, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich I von Salm nació aproximadamente 1115, en Luxembourg, Luxemburgo, su papá, Hermann II von Salm, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Agnès de Mousson, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg antes de 1169, en Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1166, en Senones, Vosges, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Metz, Moselle, Grand Est, Francia.
